message.content:
# THE PROBLEM  
## Why Businesses Are Losing Customers Every Day  

### Happy Customers Leave Silently  
Most satisfied buyers never post a review — no one asks them at the right time.  

### Competitors Pull Ahead  
Businesses with 200+ reviews get chosen first, even if your service is better.  

### Invisible on Google Maps  
Low review count = lower local SEO ranking = fewer calls and walk-ins.  

### Negative Reviews Go Public  
Unhappy customers post online with no warning — and no chance to recover them.  

### No Social Media Content  
Small businesses struggle to post consistently without a content team.  

### Reviews Sit Unseen  
Great Google reviews are hidden — never repurposed into marketing material.
